description: MicroBT/WhatsMiner: M_0 models are air-cooled (M10, M20, M30, M50, M60, M70). Last digit 0 = air cooling.

set.enrichment.Cooling Details: Air-cooled (MicroBT naming convention: last digit 0 = air)

description: MicroBT/WhatsMiner: M_3 models are hydro (water) cooled (M33, M53, M63, M73). Last digit 3 = hydro cooling.

set.enrichment.Cooling Details: Hydro (water) cooled (MicroBT naming convention: last digit 3 = hydro)

description: MicroBT/WhatsMiner: M_6 models are immersion-cooled (M36, M56, M66, M76). Last digit 6 = immersion cooling.

set.enrichment.Cooling Details: Immersion cooled (MicroBT naming convention: last digit 6 = immersion)
